message:
Fix changelog feed generation in CI

The changelog sync script uses uvx to run tenzir-ship when it
generates feeds and timeline data. Our docs workflow did not install
uv, so CI produced zero feeds and later failed link validation on
/changelog/feed.xml.

Install uv before generating the changelog so the build creates the
feed files consistently in CI.

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,11 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Setup uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
